title: Scoop Up These 4 GARP Stocks to Get Handsome Returns

title: CDW's Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Decrease Y/Y
text: CDW Corporation's (CDW) fourth-quarter performance was affected due to weakness in Small Business and Public segment.

title: CDW (CDW) Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: CDW (CDW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.04% and 11.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Tech Services Firm CDW Tops Earnings Goal But Sales Miss
text: Information technology products reseller and services provider CDW delivered a mixed fourth-quarter report. The post Tech Services Firm CDW Tops Earnings Goal But Sales Miss appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Here's What You Should Know Ahead of CDW's Q4 Earnings Release
text: CDW's fourth-quarter results are expected to be driven by solid demand for its hardware and software products.

title: My Top 15 High-Growth Dividend Stocks For February 2023
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of February. The watchlist posted a gain of 9.44% in January and starts the new year on a positive note.
